requirement_topic.en: DOSM Conformity Assessment Scope for EV Chargers — Laos Electrical Product Import Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: DOSM电动汽车充电桩合格评定适用范围——老挝电气产品进口要求
requirement_topic.zht: DOSM電動汽車充電樁合格評定適用範圍——寮國電氣產品進口要求

summary.en: The Department of Standards and Metrology (DOSM) under Laos' Ministry of Science and Technology is the national body for standards development, metrology, and conformity assessment. DOSM is a member of the ASEAN Consultative Committee for Standards and Quality (ACCSQ) and participates in regional harmonisation of product standards under the ASEAN Framework Agreement on Mutual Recognition Arrangements (MRA). Electrical equipment imported into Laos for commercial use is subject to DOSM conformity assessment, with IEC-based standards adopted as the applicable technical reference. A Certificate of Conformity or equivalent evidence of IEC standard compliance is expected for commercial electrical product imports. The exact mandatory conformity assessment route for EV chargers as a product category in Laos could not be confirmed from a single official published regulation as of 2026-06-14; exporters should verify the current DOSM conformity requirement, applicable standard, and import clearance process with DOSM or a qualified Lao customs and standards agent before shipment. MEM project licensing and EDL grid-connection approval are separately required for installation.
summary.zh: 隶属于老挝科技部的标准计量局（DOSM）是国家标准制定、计量和合格评定机构。DOSM是东盟标准质量咨询委员会（ACCSQ）成员，参与东盟相互认可协议框架下的区域产品标准协调。进口至老挝用于商业用途的电气设备须接受DOSM合格评定，以采纳的IEC体系标准作为适用技术参考。商业电气产品进口须提供合格证书或同等IEC标准合规证据。截至2026年6月14日，未能从单一官方发布法规确认老挝电动汽车充电桩产品类别的强制合格评定路径；出口商在出货前应向DOSM或合格的老挝海关和标准代理核实当前DOSM合格评定要求、适用标准和进口清关程序。安装还须单独取得MEM项目许可和EDL并网审批。
summary.zht: 隸屬於寮國科技部的標準計量局（DOSM）是國家標準制定、計量和合格評定機構。DOSM是東盟標準質量諮詢委員會（ACCSQ）成員，參與東盟相互認可協議框架下的區域產品標準協調。進口至寮國用於商業用途的電氣設備須接受DOSM合格評定，以採納的IEC體系標準作為適用技術參考。商業電氣產品進口須提供合格證書或同等IEC標準合規證據。截至2026年6月14日，未能從單一官方發布法規確認寮國電動汽車充電樁產品類別的強制合格評定路徑；出口商在出貨前應向DOSM或合格的寮國海關和標準代理核實當前DOSM合格評定要求、適用標準和進口清關程序。安裝還須單獨取得MEM項目許可和EDL併網審批。

standards_or_laws: DOSM (Lao PDR Department of Standards and Metrology) — conformity assessment for electrical equipment imports
ASEAN Framework Agreement on MRA — regional harmonisation of electrical product standards
ACCSQ (ASEAN Consultative Committee for Standards and Quality) — EE&E product working group
Lao PDR Law on Standards (2007, amended) — framework for national standards and conformity
MEM (Ministry of Energy and Mines) — project licensing for energy infrastructure installations
EDL (Electricité du Laos) — grid-connection approval for commercial EVSE installations

summary.en: China-market chargers are documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023 and GB/T 20234 connector standards, with China Compulsory Certification (CCC) applying where the charger falls within CCC scope. CCC or GB/T test evidence may support engineering review during a DOSM conformity assessment as supporting documentation, but it does not by itself establish Laos DOSM conformity or MEM/EDL approval. Laos' proximity to China and active BRI trade means Chinese-brand EVSE with Chinese-language documentation is commonly seen in the Lao market, but commercial project operators — particularly those with international financing or working with EDL on grid-connected installations — increasingly expect IEC-referenced documentation in English or Lao.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩依据GB/T 18487.1-2023及GB/T 20234接口标准准备文件；如充电桩属于CCC适用范围，须取得中国强制认证（CCC）。CCC或GB/T测试证据可作为支持文件，在DOSM合格评定工程审查期间提供辅助参考，但其本身不能证明老挝DOSM合格状态或MEM/EDL批准。老挝毗邻中国且BRI贸易活跃，带有中文文件的中国品牌EVSE在老挝市场中常见；但商业项目运营商——尤其是涉及国际融资或与EDL合作开展并网安装的项目——越来越多地要求以英文或老挝语提供IEC参考文件。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁依據GB/T 18487.1-2023及GB/T 20234接口標準準備文件；如充電樁屬於CCC適用範圍，須取得中國強制認證（CCC）。CCC或GB/T測試證據可作為支持文件，在DOSM合格評定工程審查期間提供輔助參考，但其本身不能證明寮國DOSM合格狀態或MEM/EDL批准。寮國毗鄰中國且BRI貿易活躍，帶有中文文件的中國品牌EVSE在寮國市場中常見；但商業項目運營商——尤其是涉及國際融資或與EDL合作開展併網安裝的項目——越來越多地要求以英文或寮語提供IEC參考文件。

standards_or_laws: China CCC (3C) mandatory certification where in scope

gap.en: Exporters should confirm: (1) the DOSM conformity assessment requirement for the specific product category and HS code with DOSM or a qualified Lao standards agent before shipment; (2) IEC-referenced safety and EMC test reports in English (and Lao where required) are prepared for DOSM review; (3) product labels are in Lao (and English where required) with rated voltage, frequency, power, and safety marks; (4) MEM project licensing and EDL grid-connection approval are obtained separately from DOSM product conformity; (5) for internationally-financed projects (ADB, World Bank, bilateral donors), IEC safety evidence and English-language documentation are typically required regardless of DOSM domestic process.
gap.zh: 出口商应确认：(1) 在出货前向DOSM或合格的老挝标准代理核实具体产品类别和HS编码的DOSM合格评定要求；(2) 以英文（及老挝语如有要求）准备DOSM审查所需的IEC参考安全及EMC测试报告；(3) 产品标签以老挝语（及英文如有要求）标注额定电压、频率、功率和安全标志；(4) MEM项目许可和EDL并网审批须与DOSM产品合格评定分别取得；(5) 对于国际融资项目（亚行、世界银行、双边捐助方），通常无论DOSM国内程序如何，均须提供IEC安全证据和英文文件。
gap.zht: 出口商應確認：(1) 在出貨前向DOSM或合格的寮國標準代理核實具體產品類別和HS編碼的DOSM合格評定要求；(2) 以英文（及寮語如有要求）準備DOSM審查所需的IEC參考安全及EMC測試報告；(3) 產品標籤以寮語（及英文如有要求）標注額定電壓、頻率、功率和安全標誌；(4) MEM項目許可和EDL併網審批須與DOSM產品合格評定分別取得；(5) 對於國際融資項目（亞行、世界銀行、雙邊捐助方），通常無論DOSM國內程序如何，均須提供IEC安全證據和英文文件。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — DOSM conformity assessment applies to commercial electrical product imports; exact mandatory route for EV chargers should be verified with DOSM for the specific product and HS code; MEM project licensing and EDL grid-connection approval are separately mandatory for grid-connected installations
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or recommended depending on China CCC scope; GB/T evidence and CCC are not DOSM conformity substitutes; Chinese-language-only documentation may be insufficient for DOSM, MEM/EDL, or internationally-financed projects

source.publisher: DOSM — Department of Standards and Metrology, Lao PDR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not claim automatic Laos market access from China CCC or GB/T reports alone. Verify the DOSM conformity assessment route for the specific product HS code before shipment. Prepare IEC-referenced safety and EMC evidence in English, Lao-language product labelling, and address MEM project licensing and EDL grid-connection approval separately. For internationally-financed EV projects in Laos, IEC safety evidence and English documentation are typically required regardless of DOSM domestic process.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅凭中国CCC或GB/T报告宣称自动满足老挝市场准入。出货前须核实具体产品HS编码的DOSM合格评定路径。准备英文版IEC参考安全及EMC证据、老挝语产品标签，并分别处理MEM项目许可和EDL并网审批。对于老挝国际融资电动汽车项目，无论DOSM国内程序如何，通常均须提供IEC安全证据和英文文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅憑中國CCC或GB/T報告宣稱自動滿足寮國市場准入。出貨前須核實具體產品HS編碼的DOSM合格評定路徑。準備英文版IEC參考安全及EMC證據、寮語產品標籤，並分別處理MEM項目許可和EDL併網審批。對於寮國國際融資電動汽車項目，無論DOSM國內程序如何，通常均須提供IEC安全證據和英文文件。

requirement_topic.en: Laos EV Policy — Government EV Targets, China-Laos Railway BRI Context, and Chinese-Brand EV Penetration
requirement_topic.zh: 老挝电动汽车政策——政府电动汽车目标、中老铁路BRI背景及中国品牌电动汽车渗透
requirement_topic.zht: 寮國電動汽車政策——政府電動汽車目標、中寮鐵路BRI背景及中國品牌電動汽車滲透

summary.en: Laos has articulated EV adoption ambitions as part of its green energy transition, leveraging its position as a hydropower surplus country with some of the cheapest electricity tariffs in Southeast Asia (EDL residential tariffs approximately 0.08–0.10 USD/kWh). The government's energy strategy targets EV adoption as a means to reduce fuel import expenditure and cut transport emissions, with Vientiane prioritised for EV charging infrastructure investment. The China-Laos Railway (Boten–Vientiane, opened December 2021) has materially accelerated the BRI trade corridor, with Chinese-brand EVs entering Laos in growing volumes — BYD, SAIC-MG, Wuling, and Chery are the most visible brands in the Vientiane market as of 2026. The government's EV policy creates real procurement demand for charging infrastructure but does not automatically reduce technical, conformity, or project-approval obligations for imported chargers. The dual-connector reality (IEC 62196 for formal standards alignment; GB/T hardware present to serve Chinese-brand EV fleets) is a direct consequence of this BRI-driven EV market entry.
summary.zh: 老挝将电动汽车采纳作为绿色能源转型的组成部分，凭借其作为水电过剩国家的地位——拥有东南亚最低廉的电价之一（EDL居民电价约0.08–0.10美元/千瓦时）——大力推进电动汽车发展。政府能源战略将电动汽车采纳作为减少燃料进口支出、削减交通排放的手段，并将万象列为电动汽车充电基础设施投资优先区域。中老铁路（磨丁至万象，2021年12月通车）已实质性加速BRI贸易走廊，中国品牌电动汽车以增长的数量进入老挝——截至2026年，比亚迪、上汽名爵、五菱和奇瑞是万象市场上最具知名度的品牌。政府电动汽车政策创造了充电基础设施的真实采购需求，但不会自动减少进口充电桩的技术、合格评定或项目审批义务。双接口现实（正式标准导向的IEC 62196；服务中国品牌电动汽车车队的GB/T硬件）正是BRI驱动的电动汽车市场进入的直接结果。
summary.zht: 寮國將電動汽車採納作為綠色能源轉型的組成部分，憑藉其作為水電過剩國家的地位——擁有東南亞最低廉的電價之一（EDL居民電價約0.08–0.10美元/千瓦時）——大力推進電動汽車發展。政府能源戰略將電動汽車採納作為減少燃料進口支出、削減交通排放的手段，並將萬象列為電動汽車充電基礎設施投資優先區域。中寮鐵路（磨丁至萬象，2021年12月通車）已實質性加速BRI貿易走廊，中國品牌電動汽車以增長的數量進入寮國——截至2026年，比亞迪、上汽名爵、五菱和奇瑞是萬象市場上最具知名度的品牌。政府電動汽車政策創造了充電基礎設施的真實採購需求，但不會自動減少進口充電樁的技術、合格評定或項目審批義務。雙接口現實（正式標準導向的IEC 62196；服務中國品牌電動汽車車隊的GB/T硬件）正是BRI驅動的電動汽車市場進入的直接結果。

standards_or_laws: Lao PDR National Green Growth Strategy to 2030 (revised 2021) — clean energy and EV targets
Lao PDR Energy Development Plan — MEM strategic framework
China-Laos Railway (Boten–Vientiane) — BRI trade corridor context for EV market entry
EDL electricity tariff framework — cheap hydropower as EV adoption enabler
MEM EV infrastructure promotion policy — Vientiane charging network expansion

summary.en: China's BRI engagement with Laos, anchored by the China-Laos Railway and Chinese investment in Laos' hydropower and energy sector, has created a structural commercial pathway for Chinese-brand EV and EVSE exports to Laos. Chinese manufacturers benefit from brand recognition, supply-chain proximity, and BRI trade facilitation. However, the Laos market's formal regulatory direction toward IEC standards (via DOSM and ASEAN harmonisation) means that BRI commercial presence does not substitute for IEC conformity where formal project approval or international financing requires it. The Laos EV market is best understood as a dual-track environment: (1) BRI/informal-channel GB/T-hardware deployments serving Chinese-brand EV fleets; (2) formal-channel IEC-standard deployments for internationally-financed, EDL-grid-connected, or government-supervised projects.
summary.zh: 中国以中老铁路和中国在老挝水电及能源领域投资为核心的BRI参与，为中国品牌电动汽车和EVSE出口至老挝创造了结构性商业路径。中国制造商在品牌认知度、供应链邻近性和BRI贸易便利化方面具有优势。但由于老挝市场的正式监管导向朝向IEC标准（通过DOSM和东盟协调），BRI商业存在并不能在需要正式项目审批或国际融资的场合替代IEC合格评定。老挝电动汽车市场最宜理解为双轨并行环境：(1) BRI/非正式渠道GB/T硬件部署，服务中国品牌电动汽车车队；(2) 正式渠道IEC标准部署，用于国际融资、EDL并网或政府监管项目。
summary.zht: 中國以中寮鐵路和中國在寮國水電及能源領域投資為核心的BRI參與，為中國品牌電動汽車和EVSE出口至寮國創造了結構性商業路徑。中國製造商在品牌認知度、供應鏈鄰近性和BRI貿易便利化方面具有優勢。但由於寮國市場的正式監管導向朝向IEC標準（通過DOSM和東盟協調），BRI商業存在並不能在需要正式項目審批或國際融資的場合替代IEC合格評定。寮國電動汽車市場最宜理解為雙軌並行環境：(1) BRI/非正式渠道GB/T硬件部署，服務中國品牌電動汽車車隊；(2) 正式渠道IEC標準部署，用於國際融資、EDL併網或政府監管項目。

standards_or_laws: BRI (Belt and Road Initiative) trade framework — China-Laos corridor
China-Laos Railway agreement (2021) — trade facilitation
New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan 2021–2035 (China) — context for Chinese-brand EV exports
China NDRC and MIIT EV and charging-station promotion policies

gap.en: Laos' EV market has genuine commercial momentum driven by cheap hydro electricity, government targets, BRI-channel Chinese-brand EV penetration, and growing Vientiane charging demand. Chinese EVSE exporters benefit from commercial proximity but face a dual-track compliance challenge: (1) BRI-channel deployments may proceed under informal arrangements with GB/T hardware, but commercial scale, grid-connection, and financing increasingly require IEC documentation; (2) formal DOSM/EDL/MEM-approved deployments require IEC conformity evidence, English-language documentation, and proper project licensing regardless of BRI commercial relationships. Exporters should segment their Laos pipeline by project type — BRI-channel fleet chargers vs. formal-channel grid-connected installations — and prepare appropriate documentation for each track.
gap.zh: 老挝电动汽车市场受廉价水电、政府目标、BRI渠道中国品牌电动汽车渗透和万象日益增长的充电需求推动，具有真实的商业动能。中国EVSE出口商在商业邻近性上具有优势，但面临双轨合规挑战：(1) BRI渠道部署可能在非正式安排下采用GB/T硬件推进，但商业规模化、并网和融资越来越需要IEC文件；(2) 正式DOSM/EDL/MEM审批部署需要IEC合格证据、英文文件和正式项目许可，与BRI商业关系无关。出口商应按项目类型对老挝项目管道进行细分——BRI渠道车队充电桩vs.正式渠道并网安装——并为每条轨道准备相应文件。
gap.zht: 寮國電動汽車市場受廉價水電、政府目標、BRI渠道中國品牌電動汽車滲透和萬象日益增長的充電需求推動，具有真實的商業動能。中國EVSE出口商在商業鄰近性上具有優勢，但面臨雙軌合規挑戰：(1) BRI渠道部署可能在非正式安排下採用GB/T硬件推進，但商業規模化、併網和融資越來越需要IEC文件；(2) 正式DOSM/EDL/MEM審批部署需要IEC合格證據、英文文件和正式項目許可，與BRI商業關係無關。出口商應按項目類型對寮國項目管道進行細分——BRI渠道車隊充電樁vs.正式渠道併網安裝——並為每條軌道準備相應文件。

mandatory_status.target: Policy context — Laos EV policy and BRI corridor create commercial opportunity; technical and conformity requirements under DOSM, MEM, and EDL remain in force independently of commercial BRI relationships
mandatory_status.cn: Policy and commercial context — China BRI engagement and brand presence in Laos do not substitute for IEC conformity in formal-channel projects; dual-track market reality must be assessed per project

source.publisher: Ministry of Energy and Mines, Lao PDR (MEM)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Laos' cheap hydro electricity, government EV targets, and Chinese-brand EV market penetration via the China-Laos Railway create genuine commercial opportunity for Chinese EVSE exporters. However, the market has two tracks: informal BRI-channel GB/T hardware deployments, and formal IEC-aligned DOSM/EDL/MEM-approved installations. Treat BRI commercial presence as a market signal, not a conformity shortcut. Segment the project pipeline by track and prepare IEC documentation for formal-channel projects.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 老挝廉价水电、政府电动汽车目标，以及通过中老铁路进入的中国品牌电动汽车市场渗透，为中国EVSE出口商创造了真实商业机遇。但市场存在两条轨道：非正式BRI渠道GB/T硬件部署，以及正式IEC合规DOSM/EDL/MEM审批安装。应将BRI商业存在视为市场信号而非合规捷径。按轨道细分项目管道，为正式渠道项目准备IEC文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 寮國廉價水電、政府電動汽車目標，以及通過中寮鐵路進入的中國品牌電動汽車市場滲透，為中國EVSE出口商創造了真實商業機遇。但市場存在兩條軌道：非正式BRI渠道GB/T硬件部署，以及正式IEC合規DOSM/EDL/MEM審批安裝。應將BRI商業存在視為市場信號而非合規捷徑。按軌道細分項目管道，為正式渠道項目準備IEC文件。
